entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
RAIN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
WINDY AND MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
WEST WINDS 20 TO 30 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
BLUSTERY AND MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH
GUSTS UP TO 40 MPH IN THE MORNING

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 16
NORTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 30
HIGHS AROUND 60

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
